briefs.title: Short-Term Rental Rules Expanded to Cover First Nation Laws in BC
briefs.summary: BC amended its Short-Term Rental Accommodations Regulation to include First Nation laws alongside municipal bylaws, and shifted review authority from 'responsible officials' to a central registrar.
briefs.action_required: Check whether any First Nation laws now apply to your short-term rental property and ensure your listing complies.

key_dates.label: BC Short-Term Rental Accommodations Regulation amendments take effect
